overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses intersections, and walks under overpasses in a dense urban environment with holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath an overpass, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall brutalist building with glowing teal 'Orbital Air' signage and illuminated windows
elevated concrete highway or monorail track running overhead
tall rust-colored pole with horizontal fluorescent light fixtures
building facade with large red sun and face artwork mural
large illuminated advertisement with purple and pink neon colors

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet orange-tiled sidewalk beneath an elevated highway at night. The Orbital Air building looms on the left with its distinctive teal signage, while neon billboards glow in the distance. A futuristic car passes on the street as the character follows other pedestrians through the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with marked pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the wide street at a marked crosswalk
futuristic white sedan drives past from left to right while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at a marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow and black striped crosswalk with 'WALK A MILE' text painted in green on the asphalt
digital speed limit sign displaying 'SPEED LIMIT 40' in white text
tall traffic signal pole with green walk signal illuminated
modern multi-story building with glass windows and yellow structural trim

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection at a marked crosswalk featuring 'WALK A MILE' painted on the asphalt. A digital speed limit sign and traffic light stand on the left, while a modern glass office building rises on the right. Other pedestrians cross alongside as a white sedan drives through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with shops

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker and more enclosed
passes pawn shop with bright interior lighting creating contrast with the dark surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered sidewalk area, passing concrete barriers and a pawn shop

notable_agents.action: person in green top standing at pawn shop window browsing displayed items

entered.detail: small storefront with blue 'PAWN' neon sign and brightly lit display window
horizontal red neon tube lights running along the wall at ground level
large rectangular concrete blocks lining the edge of the walkway
small enclosed security booth with glass windows and interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, covered walkway beneath the overpass where the ceiling looms overhead. A pawn shop with glowing blue signage and red neon strip lights illuminates the right side, while concrete barriers line the left. The enclosed space feels more intimate and shadowy compared to the open intersection, with a security booth visible further along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with braindance parlor and back alley

events.description: exits covered walkway and crosses another intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings
approaches dark alley with burning barrel and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching an alleyway with a burning barrel at the entrance

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left ahead

entered.detail: commercial building with large purple 'BRAINDANCE' neon sign on upper facade
blue neon sign reading 'CHEAP CYBERWARE' above a closed storefront
metal barrel with active fire burning inside, illuminating the alley entrance
narrow dark passage between buildings with stairs leading upward
large holographic advertisement displaying a figure in red colors

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character crosses another intersection dominated by the purple 'BRAINDANCE' sign and 'CHEAP CYBERWARE' neon. The scene opens into a commercial area with a holographic billboard visible ahead. The character approaches a dark alley entrance marked by a burning barrel that casts flickering orange light on the surrounding walls, creating a stark contrast with the neon-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from open city streets into a shadowy underpass before emerging into a commercial district. It begins on a wet orange-tiled sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing the teal signage of the Orbital Air building as a futuristic car glides by. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where they cross a marked asphalt walkway alongside other pedestrians and a white sedan. The environment then contracts into a darker, covered walkway characterized by the blue and red glow of a pawn shop and heavy concrete barriers. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure into a vibrant commercial area dominated by purple Braindance signage, eventually turning toward a dark alley illuminated by the flickering orange light of a burning barrel.
